overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a character in medieval clothing exploring a foggy, desolate beach and wooden pier between towering cliffs. The character walks along the shore, crosses a weathered pier over misty water, and continues along the beach toward a distant light, with heavy overcast skies and atmospheric fog throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate, foggy coastline that leads from a wide beach to a secluded cliffside waterfall and back again. It begins with the character walking through clumps of tall grass on a misty shore, approaching a weathered wooden pier that extends between towering cliff faces. As the character proceeds along the narrow planks over the water, the scene closes in around them until it opens up at the pier's end to reveal a misty waterfall cascading through a natural stone archway. After a brief pause to observe the falls, the camera follows the character as they turn and retreat along the pier, passing stone ruins on the shore before stepping back onto the sand. The shot finally expands across the wide beach and weathered rock formations, tracking the character as they head toward the distant, warm glow of a torch held by a mysterious figure in the fog.
